title: Apex Fusion Research
lines: You heave the heavy grate aside and pull yourself up into a massive, sterile, but abandoned facility.
Emergency lights flicker off the stainless steel walls. A large logo on the floor reads: APEX FUSION RESEARCH. CHEMICAL AND BIOLOGICAL SYNTHESIS.
The facility looks undisturbed, except for the massive vats of glowing green goo that have ruptured open, flooding the vents.
There is a main terminal desk in the center of the room with scattered, classified documents.
